notes:
NovaPanel v0.7.28

- Two confirmed v0.7.27 failures fixed.
- Failure A (test-update missing in packaged app.asar): package.json build.files added test-update/**/* (sat next to test-support/**/*). Without this glob electron-builder did not pack test-update/index.js so require(./test-update) from main.js threw Cannot find module in packaged builds. scripts/build-tester.js build gate now requires test-update/index.js entry inside app.asar - build aborts with HARD FAIL if absent.
- Failure B (extract integrity validation did not execute / did not block): added unmistakable activation marker [extract-integrity] ACTIVE v0.7.28 as the FIRST log line of PHASE 3. All ZIP-entry checks and post-extract checks now log with [extract-integrity] prefix and an explicit decision: PASS / decision: FAIL line. Absence of the ACTIVE marker in updater-helper.log proves the running helper is older than v0.7.28. Existing v0.7.27 validation logic preserved verbatim - only the logging wrapper made unmissable.
- No changes to relaunch logic, copy strategy except where wired by extract failure (extract throws -> phase wrapper exits, copy never starts), release scripts, or canary harness classification.
